query: SELECT tc.organizationId, o.name as orgName, tc.taskId, tc.completed, tc.notApplicable, tc.inProgress, tc.blocked, tc.targetDate, tc.notes FROM taskCompletion tc LEFT JOIN organizations o ON tc.organizationId = o.id WHERE tc.taskId LIKE '%:%' AND (tc.completed=1 OR tc.inProgress=1 OR tc.blocked=1 OR tc.notes IS NOT NULL) LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27oV2HNhPbfG1Yy.f6bc15b848e8 --database hgGEXRHUCG7apwzJRKH7LF --execute SELECT tc.organizationId, o.name as orgName, tc.taskId, tc.completed, tc.notApplicable, tc.inProgress, tc.blocked, tc.targetDate, tc.notes FROM taskCompletion tc LEFT JOIN organizations o ON tc.organizationId = o.id WHERE tc.taskId LIKE '%:%' AND (tc.completed=1 OR tc.inProgress=1 OR tc.blocked=1 OR tc.notes IS NOT NULL) LIMIT 10;
